narrative: China export surge and Iran war risks drive a global stockpiling rush, lifting crude toward $100 and pressuring CAD; USD/CAD firms to 1.3688 as the 150bp Fed-BoC carry advantage anchors the pair. NZD/CAD emerges as the week's dominant G8 theme with a 1.453% spread as NZD (+0.533% avg) outperforms CAD (-0.920% avg). Gold lower -0.62% near $4,701; equities +0.84%; DXY +0.14%; VIX 17.2. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
